title: Nebula [16x]
body:
Nebula is a clean space themed 1.8.9 purple pvp pack made by Akooa and myself.

It is mainly made for pvp but can be used overall.

Here are some ingame screenshots with the pack :

![Nebula Prev 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/384568a37fdb051720618bac2f3a6f322bd123e8.jpeg)

![Nebula Prev 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efd6607a501c7271ae7e57f9debf59d9695323af.jpeg)

![Nebula Prev 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e77b646f702a580f40d38493e8cce63466a8098b.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
